name: Katie's Court
description: Katie's Court is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Watford City, ND. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Rough Rider Center
description: Rough Rider Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Watford City, ND. There are 8 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights. Reservations are available.
